title: MR-08 append-only correction path for checkout, service, blockers, and resource release

compensating_actions: Blocker + manual resolution WorkItem when ResourceInventory reversal is unavailable

steps: If a case was closed incorrectly, append CaseReopenedLite and create blocker resolution WorkItems.
If a service task fact is incorrect, append ServiceTaskCorrectionLite with reason and owner.
If a resource release was requested incorrectly, create ResourceReleaseReversalRequest when ResourceInventory supports it.
If ResourceInventory cannot reverse automatically, create a Blocker and manual resolution WorkItem owned by manager/operator.
Never delete CheckoutCaseClosed or BedReleased events and never update bed status directly with SQL.
validation_steps: Verify corrected case timeline shows reopened/correction event.
Verify blockers have ownerRole and resolveAction.
Verify ResourceInventory remains the owner of bed/room release facts.
Verify GateResult evidence maps compensation to No-Go item and manual resolution WorkItem.
